name: ClawVitals
description: Security posture tracking, recurring scans, delta alerts, and fleet dashboard for OpenClaw installations.

enabled.description: Send anonymous scan summaries to telemetry.clawvitals.io. Enabled by default — this powers the dashboard. Disable with clawvitals telemetry off.

alias.description: Human-readable name for this installation on the clawvitals.io/dashboard. Used instead of the raw install UUID. Useful for fleet management (e.g. 'prod-server-1', 'dev-laptop'). Max 64 chars.

on_regression.description: Alert when score drops or a new FAIL is detected since last scan.

on_new_critical.description: Alert immediately when a critical-severity finding appears.

threshold.description: Minimum severity level to trigger alerts.

retention_days.description: Number of days to retain local scan history.

telemetry.alias.label: Installation alias
telemetry.alias.hint: Shown on clawvitals.io/dashboard instead of the raw install ID

telemetry.enabled.label: Telemetry
telemetry.enabled.hint: Powers the dashboard. Anonymous scan summaries only — no config, credentials, or finding details.
